Terms & Conditions

Draft placeholder: these terms are not final legal advice and should be reviewed before use.

Introduction

This page is a draft summary for Party.LAN customers and will be updated with final terms before bookings are accepted.

Booking

Booking details, dates, venue access and package choice will be confirmed during enquiry.

Payment

Payment terms are not yet finalised and will be confirmed before any booking is accepted.

Cancellation

Cancellation terms are draft placeholders and should not be treated as final commitments.

Venue Access

Customers may be asked to provide access details so equipment can be delivered and set up safely.

Room And Power Requirements

Party.LAN may ask for room photos, rough dimensions and power access information to help plan the setup.

Supervision

Appropriate adult supervision and venue permissions may be required depending on the event.

Equipment Care

Customers and guests should treat supplied equipment carefully during the hosted session.

Damage

Damage responsibilities are draft placeholders and will be confirmed in final terms.

Travel

Travel availability and any travel considerations will be confirmed during enquiry.

Contact

Use the contact or availability enquiry route on the homepage for questions.

Hosted gaming parties, delivered to your venue.
